title: p-adic L-functions at Rank 2 — Double Zero in Berkovich

analysis.object: T868: p-adic L-functions at Rank 2 — Double Zero in Berkovich depth analysis

padic_l_rank2.description: p-adic L-function L_p(E,s) at rank 2: double zero at s=1

exceptional_zero.description: Exceptional zero: L_p(E,1) = 0 even when L(E,1) = 0. MTT conjecture.

berkovich_double_zero.description: Double zero in Berkovich space: the zero has multiplicity 2. Berkovich geometry handles multiplicity.

mtt_rank2.description: MTT for rank 2: L_p^{(2)}(E,1) / L''(E,1) = (1-a_p^{-1})^4 * (p-adic log). Controlled ratio.

berkovich_descent_double.description: Berkovich descent with multiplicity: T775 pattern applies to double zeros

rank2_padic_bsd.description: p-adic BSD rank 2: double zero descends to classical double zero via T775

t868_theorem.description: T868: Double zero of p-adic L-function at rank 2 lives in Berkovich space. MTT ratio is EML-3 controlled. Berkovich descent (T775) applies to multiplicity-2 zeros. p-adic BSD rank 2 follows. T868.
t868_theorem.reason: p-adic BSD rank 2 via Berkovich double zero. T868.

analysis.theorem: T868: p-adic L-functions at Rank 2 — Double Zero in Berkovich (S1148).

key_theorem: T868: p-adic L-functions at Rank 2 — Double Zero in Berkovich (S1148).
